get
/databases/(default)/documents
Want to develop and debug your rules?
77
 
1
rules_version = '2';
2
service cloud.firestore {
3
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
4
5
    // Admins can read/write everything
6
    match /admins/{adminId} {
7
      allow read, write: if isAdmin();
8
    }
9
10
    // Students collection - Basic access control
11
    match /students/{studentId} {
12
      // Students can read their own data
13
      allow read: if isStudent() && request.auth.uid == studentId;
14
      // Students can update their own profile (but not change year or role)
15
      allow update: if isStudent() && request.auth.uid == studentId &&
16
                   !('year' in request.resource.data) &&
17
                   !('role' in request.resource.data);
18
      // Only admins can create or delete student records
19
      allow create, delete: if isAdmin();
20
    }
21
22
    // Tests collection - Year-based access
23
    match /tests/{testId} {
24
      // Admins can do everything
25
      allow read, write: if isAdmin();
26
      // Students can read tests for their year
27
      allow read: if isStudent() &&
28
                 resource.data.year == getStudentYear(request.auth.uid);
29
    }
30
31
    // Test Results collection - Student-specific access
32
    match /testResults/{resultId} {
33
      // Admins can do everything
34
      allow read, write: if isAdmin();
35
      // Students can read their own results
36
      allow read: if isStudent() &&
37
                 exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/testResults/$(resultId)) &&
38
                 get(/databases/$(database)/documents/testResults/$(resultId)).data.studentId == request.auth.uid;
39
      // Students can create their own results (when taking a test)
40
      allow create: if isStudent() &&
41
                   request.resource.data.studentId == request.auth.uid &&
42
                   request.resource.data.year == getStudentYear(request.auth.uid);
43
      // Students can update their own results (if needed)
44
      allow update: if isStudent() &&
45
                   resource.data.studentId == request.auth.uid;
46
    }
47
48
    // Notifications collection - Year-based access
49
    match /notifications/{notificationId} {
50
      // Admins can do everything
51
      allow read, write: if isAdmin();
52
      // Students can read notifications for their year or "all" years
53
      allow read: if isStudent() &&
54
                 (resource.data.year == getStudentYear(request.auth.uid) ||
55
                  resource.data.year == "all");
56
      // Students can update their read status
57
      allow update: if isStudent() &&
58
                   request.resource.data.keys().hasOnly(['readBy']) &&
59
                   request.resource.data.readBy is list &&
60
                   request.resource.data.readBy.size() >= resource.data.readBy.size() &&
61
                   request.resource.data.readBy[request.resource.data.readBy.size()-1] == request.auth.uid;
62
    }
63
64
    // Helper functions
65
    function isAdmin() {
66
      return exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/admins/$(request.auth.uid));
67
    }
68
69
    function isStudent() {
70
      return exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/students/$(request.auth.uid));
71
    }
72
73
    function getStudentYear(studentId) {
74
      return get(/databases/$(database)/documents/students/$(studentId)).data.year;
75
    }
76
  }
77
}
xxxxxxxxxx
 
1
​
⬅
xxxxxxxxxx
46
 
1
rules_version = '2';
2
service cloud.firestore {
3
  match /databases/{database}/documents {
4
    function isSignedIn() {
5
      return request.auth != null;
6
    }
7
​
8
    function isSelf(uid) {
9
      return request.auth.uid == uid;
10
    }
11
​
12
    function isEmailVerified() {
13
      return request.auth.token.email_verified == true;
14
    }
15
​
16
    function isAdmin() {
17
      return exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/admins/$(request.auth.uid));
18
    }
19
​
20
    // Students: Only students can manage their own data
21
    match /students/{userId} {
22
      allow create: if isSignedIn() && isSelf(userId) && isEmailVerified();
23
      allow read, update, delete: if isSignedIn() && isSelf(userId) && isEmailVerified();
24
    }
25
​
26
    // Admins: Only admins can manage admin docs
27
    match /admins/{adminId} {
28
      allow create, read, update, delete: if isSignedIn() && isSelf(adminId);
29
    }
30
​
31
    // Tests: Only admins can manage tests
32
    match /tests/{testId} {
33
      allow read, write, update, delete: if isAdmin();
34
    }
35
​
36
    // 👇 CRITICAL: Allow ADMIN to READ ALL STUDENTS (even if not their own)
37
    match /students/{studentId} {
38
      allow read: if isAdmin();
39
    }
40
​
41
    // Block all other access
42
    match /{document=**} {
43
      allow read, write: if false;
44
    }
45
  }
46
}
